channel.title: 25th Anniversary on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in 25th Anniversary on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Google Images Turns 25
item.description:
Introduction to Google Images’ New Feature  

Google is announcing a significant change to the Google Images homepage in honor of the platform’s 25th anniversary. The change is expected to be released in conjunction with the platform’s 25th anniversary, although no specific date has been mentioned. This new feature is a “browseable” homepage that will allow users to explore a dynamic, immersive gallery of images from across the web.
